summary: Full backend + frontend testing of CODECRAFT one-page site completed. All 6 backend pytest tests passed (root, valid lead, invalid email, missing fields, list-leads persistence, legacy status). Full frontend UI verified via Playwright: header, hero, marquee, 8 course rows, outcomes stats, about, 3 mentor cards, reviews carousel (prev/next), location + Google Maps iframe + open-in-maps link, footer, ContactFab (whatsapp+call), mobile menu panel, and contact form submission with successful POST /api/leads returning 201 and form reset. No horizontal overflow at 390px or 768px viewports.

issues: During count-up animation, stat-1 (percentage) briefly displays '-0%' as it interpolates upward. Purely a transient visual — final value settles correctly. Consider clamping to non-negative or starting from 0 without a minus sign.

React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Likely coming from a dev-instrumentation wrapper around COURSES option labels in Contact.jsx. Cosmetic in dev builds but should be cleaned up.

action_items: (Optional) Prevent transient '-0%' display in Outcomes count-up (Outcomes.jsx / useCountUp).
(Optional) Investigate span-inside-option hydration warning on the course select in Contact.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean, uses UUIDs, excludes Mongo _id, proper 201/validation. Good.
Frontend: form validation is client-side + server-side (EmailStr, min_length). Behaviour verified: empty submit shows toast/hint and does not reset; valid submit calls /api/leads and resets. Good.
No hardcoded backend URL in frontend; uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Good.
seed_data_creation: Created a couple of TEST_ prefixed leads and status_checks via API during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is a single-page anchor-nav app. Preloader dismisses ~1.1s post-load; add a 2s wait after navigation. All interactive elements use data-testid per the spec. Google Maps loads real tiles (network calls to maps.googleapis.com visible). Contact submission verified end-to-end (POST 201, form reset).
